stories.title: Texas Wins First-Ever SEC Softball Championship — Teagan Kavan's 12-K Masterpiece

x_posts.label: Post 1-1
x_posts.text: TEXAS IS YOUR 2026 SEC SOFTBALL CHAMPION — for the first time ever. Teagan Kavan went the distance with 12 strikeouts. Katie Stewart (SEC POY) went 3-for-5 with a homer and 2 RBI. Longhorns beat Alabama 7-1. Historic. #HookEm #CollegeSoftball

x_posts.label: Post 1-2
x_posts.text: Texas beat Alabama 7-1 for the SEC title, and now the Longhorns lead D-I with 20 Quad 1 wins at 42-10. The No. 1 national seed is theirs to lose. Selection Show tonight, 7 PM ET on ESPN2. #HookEm #CollegeSoftball

stories.title: Megan Grant Breaks All-Time NCAA HR Record — 38th Homer in Big Ten Title Game

x_posts.label: Post 2-1
x_posts.text: HISTORY. Megan Grant just hit her 38th home run of the season — the most in NCAA softball history. She broke Laura Espinoza's 31-year-old record (37 HR, Arizona, 1995) in the Big Ten championship game against Nebraska. 38 HRs in 55 games. Unreal. #GoBruins #CollegeSoftball

x_posts.label: Post 2-2
x_posts.text: Put it in perspective: Espinoza's record of 37 HRs stood since 1995 and took 72 games to set. Megan Grant did it in 55 games. Even in a loss, she made softball history. The most prolific power season the sport has ever seen. #GoBruins #CollegeSoftball

article.headline: Megan Grant Shatters 31-Year NCAA Single-Season Home Run Record With Her 38th

stories.title: Arizona State Stuns Texas Tech 4-0 — Kenzie Brown's Shutout Wins Big 12 Title

x_posts.label: Post 3
x_posts.text: UPSET. No. 6 seed Arizona State blanked Texas Tech 4-0 to win the Big 12 Softball Championship. Kenzie Brown: 9 K, 2 hits allowed, complete-game shutout. Sun Devils hit 3 HRs in one inning. ASU's first Big 12 Tournament title. #ForksUp #CollegeSoftball

stories.title: FSU Wins 20th ACC Championship 2-1 Over Virginia Tech — Jazzy Francik MVP

x_posts.label: Post 4
x_posts.text: Florida State wins its 20th ACC Softball Championship, beating Virginia Tech 2-1. Jazzy Francik: 10 K, 1 ER in 11.2 tournament innings — named tournament MVP. The 20th ACC title for FSU. Program excellence on full display. #Noles #CollegeSoftball

stories.title: Selection Show Tonight — Four Champions, One Bracket, 7 PM ET on ESPN2

x_posts.label: Post 5
x_posts.text: Championship Weekend is DONE. Four conference champions: Texas (SEC), Nebraska (Big Ten), FSU (ACC), Arizona State (Big 12). The bracket drops TONIGHT — Selection Show, 7 PM ET on ESPN2. Texas is the projected No. 1 national seed. Don't miss it. #CollegeSoftball

x_posts.label: Post 6
x_posts.text: Your 2026 conference softball champions: Texas (SEC, first ever). Nebraska (Big Ten, 21-game win streak). Florida State (ACC, 20th title). Arizona State (Big 12, biggest upset of the week). NCAA bracket on ESPN2 right now. #CollegeSoftball
